base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_holy_water_fire_bomb — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1986 castlevania. Holy Water bottle subweapon — thrown short distance to ground, shatters in flame on impact. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Holy Water bottle subweapon — thrown short distance to ground, shatters in flame on impact; 5-frame animation (bottle mid-air → bottle-shatter → 3-frame flame-pillar). Stuns enemies standing on fire. Heart cost 1 (2 for Stopwatch+)
